cards.back: A type of neural network that uses feedback connections to maintain internal state and capture temporal relationships
A type of RNN that uses memory cells and gates to learn long-term dependencies in sequences
A layer in a neural network that processes sequential input using RNNs
A problem in training RNNs where gradients are gradually zeroed out during backpropagation, leading to difficulty in learning long-term dependencies
An optimization algorithm used to minimize loss functions in neural networks, including RNNs
